gaps.missing: spatial validation of the fibroblast/immune signal
gaps.why: The fibroblast enrichment and immune exclusion came from dissociated single-cell data, which loses spatial context. Spatial confirmation of B7-H3-high, immune-excluded niches is needed before synthesis.

experiments.proposed_experiment: spatial / single-cell profiling resolving tumour vs stroma
experiments.expected_readout: fraction of B7-H3 signal on malignant cells vs fibroblast/immune stroma
experiments.why: the specificity signal was stromal; an ADC needs a tumour-cell target to be efficacious

experiments.proposed_experiment: multi-tissue specificity profiling across a normal-tissue atlas
experiments.expected_readout: cross-tissue tau bounding the therapeutic window
experiments.why: single-tissue tau does not bound normal-tissue on-target toxicity

note: Illustrative cached reviewer verdict for the demo walkthrough; exercises the one-pass re-route loop and proposes follow-up experiments.
